headline: Albemarle: A Different Storage Boom
summary: Albemarle Corporation is regaining momentum as lithium prices rebound, driven by surging energy storage systems. Learn why ALB stock is a strong buy.

headline: Albemarle (ALB) Wins Analyst Upgrades As Lithium Expansion Story Gains Support
summary: Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) received analyst upgrades in the past week, highlighting confidence in its lithium-focused business model. Research firms cited Albemarle’s plans for expansion and productivity improvements as key factors behind their revised views. The company is viewed as well positioned to serve structural lithium demand tied to electrification and energy storage trends. Albemarle enters this news cycle with its stock at $133.7, after a pullback of 16.6% over the past week and 24.7%...
